name: Duo Auth API
description: The Duo Auth API (by Cisco Duo) lets you integrate two-factor authentication into your application. It supports pre-authentication checks, second-factor authentication (push, passcode, phone, SMS), user enrollment, and server health checks. Requests are signed using HMAC-SHA1.
